title: crotalaria annua
intro: Crotalaria annua, also known as the annual rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria annua lie in its ability to act as a purgative, emetic, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems, among others. Crotalaria annua is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and its leaves, seeds, and roots are used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
